title: How to Get Rid of a Body (And Still Be Friends)
original_title: How To Get Rid Of A Body (and still be friends)
overview: Three women, best friends since childhood, reunite for a weekend getaway. All hell breaks loose when they think they killed the pizza deliveryman.
